greetings.cold: Signor Gibbons. The fruit today is bellissimo and you are missing it. A tragedy.
greetings.neutral: Gibbons! Come, come — the good ones, just in!
greetings.warm: GARY! My friend! Today the grapes sing, and you will suffer, and it will be beautiful!

etiquette.note: Interviewing Gino means holding whatever fruit he hands you. The whole time. Everything is bellissimo or a tragedy, no middle.
